category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Zambia.

title.en: China-to-Zambia EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入赞比亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入尚比亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Zambia ZABS / ERB / ZESCO requirements, IEC 61851 safety and EMC standards, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, ZESCO grid-connection requirements, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines. Includes honest context on Zambia's nascent EV market and grid-reliability constraints.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与赞比亚ZABS / ERB / ZESCO要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC标准、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、ZESCO并网要求、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。包含对赞比亚新兴电动汽车市场及电网可靠性约束的客观说明。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與尚比亞ZABS / ERB / ZESCO要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC標準、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、ZESCO併網要求、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。包含對尚比亞新興電動汽車市場及電網可靠性約束的客觀說明。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Zambia, the confirmed practical gaps are: connector hardware redesign from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 (AC) / CCS2 (DC), since Zambia's IEC-aligned direction is physically incompatible with GB/T connectors; IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23 safety evidence required under IEC-based conformity (ZABS adopts IEC standards); ZABS import conformity assessment and ERB licensing as the regulatory gates; ZESCO grid-connection approval for any charger installation drawing from the national grid; and EMC evidence under IEC 61000. Zambia's grid operates at 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz — close to but distinct from China's 220 V / 380 V domestic baseline, and voltage-range confirmation is required. Critically, Zambia's EV market is very nascent and load-shedding / grid-reliability constraints are a real operational factor that exporters must factor into charger design (e.g. wide input-voltage range, battery buffer, or off-grid capability). A definitive mandatory EVSE-specific product certification rule under ZABS could not be confirmed from official published sources as of 2026-06-14; exporters should verify the current ZABS import conformity route, ERB licensing scope, HS code, and ZESCO connection process before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入赞比亚时，已确认的实务差距包括：由于赞比亚IEC体系方向与GB/T接口在物理上不兼容，须将接口从GB/T 20234硬件改为IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）/ CCS2（直流）；在基于IEC的合格评定下（ZABS采用IEC标准），须提供IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23安全证据；ZABS进口合格评定和ERB许可是监管门槛；任何接入国家电网的充电桩安装均须取得ZESCO并网批准；以及须提供IEC 61000体系的EMC证据。赞比亚电网为230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz——接近但有别于中国220 V / 380 V国内基线，须确认电压范围。特别值得注意的是，赞比亚电动汽车市场非常新兴，限电/电网可靠性约束是真实的运营因素，出口商必须将其纳入充电桩设计（例如宽输入电压范围、储能缓冲或离网能力）。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方已发布来源确认赞比亚ZABS下适用于所有EVSE整机的具体强制产品认证规则；出口商应在出货前核实当前ZABS进口合格评定路径、ERB许可范围、HS编码及ZESCO接入流程。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入尚比亞時，已確認的實務差距包括：由於尚比亞IEC體系方向與GB/T接口在物理上不兼容，須將接口從GB/T 20234硬體改為IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）/ CCS2（直流）；在基於IEC的合格評定下（ZABS採用IEC標準），須提供IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23安全證據；ZABS進口合格評定和ERB許可是監管門檻；任何接入國家電網的充電樁安裝均須取得ZESCO併網批准；以及須提供IEC 61000體系的EMC證據。尚比亞電網為230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz——接近但有別於中國220 V / 380 V國內基線，須確認電壓範圍。特別值得注意的是，尚比亞電動汽車市場非常新興，限電/電網可靠性約束是真實的運營因素，出口商必須將其納入充電樁設計（例如寬輸入電壓範圍、儲能緩衝或離網能力）。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方已發布來源確認尚比亞ZABS下適用於所有EVSE整機的具體強制產品認證規則；出口商應在出貨前核實當前ZABS進口合格評定路徑、ERB許可範圍、HS編碼及ZESCO接入流程。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ZABS scope determination, ERB licence approval, ZESCO connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Zambia conformity assessment rules, ERB licensing requirements, ZESCO connection procedures, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ZABS适用范围裁定、ERB许可批准、ZESCO接入批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行赞比亚合格评定规则、ERB许可要求、ZESCO接入程序、IEC标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ZABS適用範圍裁定、ERB許可批准、ZESCO接入批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行尚比亞合格評定規則、ERB許可要求、ZESCO接入程序、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
